nasb.text: Then Aaron’s sons shall offer it up in smoke on the altar on the burnt offering, which is on the wood that is on the fire; it is an offering by fire of a soothing aroma to the Lord.

esv.text: Then Aaron’s sons shall burn it on the altar on top of the burnt offering, which is on the wood on the fire; it is a food offering with a pleasing aroma to the Lord.

cnv.text: 亞倫的子孫要把這些放在祭壇炭火上的木柴上面，在燔祭上焚燒，作獻給耶和華馨香的火祭。

ccb.text: 祭司要把这一切放在祭坛燃烧的木柴上和燔祭一起焚烧，作为蒙耶和华悦纳的馨香火祭。
